summary: Comprehensive testing of LIVE/DEMO mode functionality across My-AlphaAI platform. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - mode-aware rendering verified on Alerts, Analytics, Agents, and Admin pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: LIVE/DEMO mode system is fully functional. Backend endpoints tested: GET/POST /api/system/mode, GET /api/alerts/live, GET /api/events/live, GET /api/agents/performance, GET /api/analytics/summary. All endpoints correctly return mode-aware data. Frontend pages tested: AlertsPage (shows 'Live Alerts' vs 'Demo Alerts' title, LIVE/DEMO badge), AnalyticsPage (shows 'LIVE DATA' vs 'DEMO DATA' badge), Navigation (shows 'LIVE MODE' or 'DEMO MODE' badge), DemoModeBanner (purple banner visible only in demo mode), AdminPage (system mode toggle works correctly). Mode switching via admin toggle on /admin page works end-to-end.

backend_api: POST /api/system/mode switches mode with admin_key - PASS
POST /api/system/mode rejects without valid admin_key - PASS
GET /api/alerts/live returns real data in LIVE mode - PASS
GET /api/alerts/live returns demo data in DEMO mode - PASS
GET /api/events/live returns real data in LIVE mode - PASS
GET /api/events/live returns demo data in DEMO mode - PASS
GET /api/agents/performance returns real data in LIVE mode - PASS
GET /api/agents/performance returns demo data with is_demo=true in DEMO mode - PASS
GET /api/analytics/summary returns real signal data in LIVE mode - PASS
GET /api/analytics/summary returns demo data in DEMO mode - PASS
frontend_ui: Alerts page shows 'Live Alerts' title and LIVE badge in live mode - PASS
Alerts page shows 'Demo Alerts' title and DEMO badge in demo mode - PASS
Analytics page shows 'LIVE DATA' badge in live mode - PASS
Analytics page shows 'DEMO DATA' badge in demo mode - PASS
Navigation shows 'LIVE MODE' or 'DEMO MODE' badge - PASS
Demo mode shows global purple banner at top of page - PASS
Admin page has system mode toggle that switches between LIVE and DEMO - PASS
